title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kharagpur

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kharagpur
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kharagpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kharagpur:
IIT Kharagpur is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur!
